# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence

P.R.D.S is a high-level business intelligence firm specializing in human risk consulting with Israeli expertise. The company combines advanced OSINT, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to conduct deep assessments of individuals before they enter sensitive roles or partnerships. Unlike standard background checks, P.R.D.S focuses on supporting businesses and managers through discreet, strategic advisory services that prevent internal theft, fraud, and losses caused by misplaced trust—a rare offering in the U.S. market.

Source: https://prdsbi.com

---

## Prevent Insider Threats Before They Strike — P.R.D.S

URL: https://prdsbi.com
Description: P.R.D.S delivers Israeli-grade human risk consulting for U.S. businesses. Stop fraud, theft, and bad hires with advanced OSINT and behavioral intelligence.

# Insight That Protects Your Business


### Comprehensive intelligence and strategic analysis across hires, partners, investors, and internal teams-giving you clarity, preventing fraud, and verifying trust before critical decisions.


Book a private consultation
View services














## What P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence delivers.


Strategic advisory services designed to prevent internal threats, verify trust before commitment, and protect your organization from risk that standard background checks miss.









### Pre-Role Risk Assessment



Deep OSINT analysis combined with behavioral profiling to build an integrity risk profile before a candidate enters a sensitive role.


- Digital footprint & public records verification

- Behavioral risk indicators and red flag analysis

- Executive decision memo with hiring guidance









### Partnership & Investor Vetting



Trust verification before capital or strategic access changes hands. Protect your business from bad actors posing as partners or investors.


- Financial history & litigation review

- Reputation verification across networks

- Risk assessment report with go/no-go recommendation









### Insider Threat Advisory



Identify risk signals within your existing team, review access protocols, and implement a prevention plan to mitigate internal theft or fraud.


- Access audit & privilege review

- Behavioral anomaly detection framework

- Prevention protocol with monitoring guidelines









### Strategic Interview & Behavioral Readout



Structured interviewing with trained analysis to assess integrity, motivations, and reliability. Delivered as a concise behavioral readout with decision guidance.


- Behavioral interview protocol execution

- Micro-expression & response pattern analysis

- Decision memo with trust score and recommendations
















## Why standard checks miss what matters




### Deep interview uncovered what background checks missed


A mid-size company engaged P.R.D.S to assess a senior candidate for a key leadership role. The standard background check returned clean results. During a structured deep interview, our analysts identified significant inconsistencies in the candidate's account of a previous role, evasive response patterns around a specific employment gap, and uncovered the real reason the candidate had left their previous position — a non-professional incident that had been deliberately concealed. The company declined the hire, a decision that later proved critical.




### Sensitive inquiry reveals pattern of undisclosed activity with potential regulatory implications


A client engaged P.R.D.S to conduct a discreet inquiry into a senior figure operating in the public sector. Our findings indicated that the subject may have been involved in certain private commercial activities during a period when such involvement would have been strictly prohibited by virtue of his position. The matter was referred to professional counsel. We are not in a position to disclose further details.



















## Outcomes executives care about.





### Faster clarity


Accelerate go/no-go decisions with clear intelligence that cuts through ambiguity and reduces time-to-hire or partnership risk.





### Reduced fraud exposure


Lower internal loss and fraud risk by identifying behavioral red flags before they enter your organization or partnership structure.





### Trust-based disruption prevention


Minimize operational disruption caused by misplaced trust in key hires, partners, or vendors through strategic pre-assessment.





### Clear written advisory


Receive a structured memo format that stakeholders can review, archive, and reference—no jargon, just actionable intelligence.

## Human Risk Intelligence Services — P.R.D.S

URL: https://prdsbi.com/services
Description: Beyond background checks: OSINT verification, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to protect your business from costly hiring mistakes and fraud.

P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence
























































- Services
- Methodology
- Cases








עברית



Contact










# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence


We provide discreet advisory engagements designed to surface hidden risk, validate credibility, and protect leadership decisions. Our approach combines advanced OSINT, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to deliver actionable intelligence that standard background checks cannot uncover.






### Discretion-first process


Every engagement is conducted with absolute confidentiality. We operate quietly, protecting both your organization's interests and the dignity of the assessment process.





### Actionable decision memo


You receive a clear, executive-ready report that highlights material findings and provides specific recommendations—no ambiguity, no filler.





### Israeli expertise in human risk work


Our methodology draws from proven Israeli intelligence techniques, adapted for corporate environments where trust is currency and risk is hidden in plain sight.














## Core capabilities.




### OSINT verification


We conduct comprehensive open-source intelligence gathering to verify claims, uncover discrepancies, and build a factual foundation before any engagement or hire.




### Behavioral risk indicators


Our analysts identify patterns in conduct, communication, and decision-making that signal potential integrity issues or operational vulnerabilities.




### Structured strategic interviewing


We deploy Israeli-trained interview techniques to surface inconsistencies and evaluate character under controlled, professional conditions.




### Network and association mapping


We trace relationships, affiliations, and connections to assess reputational exposure and detect hidden conflicts of interest.




### Narrative consistency analysis


We cross-reference statements, timelines, and documentation to validate authenticity and flag fabricated or embellished histories.




### Executive advisory and decision support


We provide discreet, actionable intelligence briefings to support high-stakes hiring, partnership, and internal governance decisions.


















## What you receive






### Risk & credibility memo


A clear narrative synthesizing findings into actionable intelligence. Evidence-backed, structured for decision-makers.


- Behavioral risk indicators

- Credibility assessment

- Historical pattern analysis







### Decision guidance


Direct go/no-go recommendation with conditional scenarios. Strategic clarity for high-stakes hiring and partnerships.


- Go/no-go assessment

- Conditional approval paths

- Risk-weighted scenarios







### Mitigation plan


Practical controls, access restrictions, and monitoring recommendations tailored to identified vulnerabilities.


- Access control recommendations

- Monitoring protocols

- Risk containment strategies



















## How engagements stay discreet and defensible.




Confidentiality posture maintained throughout all phases of assessment and reporting.




Source triangulation ensures findings are corroborated through multiple independent channels.




Minimum necessary exposure principle limits inquiry scope to what's relevant and defensible.




Documentation discipline creates clear audit trails for stakeholder review when needed.




Clear boundaries and ethics guide every engagement with transparent methodology.




Stakeholder-ready communication delivers findings in formats that support decision-making.













## Discuss your scenario confidentially.


Whether you're navigating sensitive hiring decisions, evaluating access to critical systems, addressing internal risk concerns, or vetting a high-stakes partnership, we're here to help. Reach out to discuss how human risk consulting can protect your business from misplaced trust.

Contact Us










Empowering decisions through intelligence and insight.

## Israeli OSINT &amp; Behavioral Analysis Methods — P.R.D.S

URL: https://prdsbi.com/methodology
Description: Discover our proven methodology combining advanced open-source intelligence, psychological profiling, and strategic interviews to uncover hidden risks.

Methodology
























































- Services
- Methodology
- Cases








עברית



Contact










# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence


Our methodology blends verification, behavioral assessment, and structured interviews to produce decision-ready guidance—not a generic report. Every engagement is tailored to the specific role, partnership, or situation, ensuring you receive actionable intelligence that supports confident decision-making.














## Engagement flow







### 1. Scope and sensitivity framing


We begin by understanding the context, role requirements, and organizational sensitivities. This ensures our assessment aligns with your decision-making needs and maintains appropriate discretion throughout.








### 2. Open-source verification and triangulation


Using advanced OSINT techniques, we gather and cross-reference publicly available information to build a comprehensive factual foundation. Multiple data points are verified independently to ensure accuracy.








### 3. Behavioral signal synthesis


We analyze patterns, inconsistencies, and behavioral indicators that may signal risk. This synthesis combines our Israeli intelligence methodology with business context to identify red flags that standard checks miss.








### 4. Strategic interview (if applicable)


When warranted, we conduct carefully structured conversations to clarify findings, assess credibility, and observe real-time behavioral responses. These interviews are conducted with professionalism and respect.








### 5. Advisory memo and decision briefing


We deliver a clear, actionable report with risk assessment and strategic recommendations. The briefing is structured to support your decision-making process with confidence and clarity.















## What informs the assessment.




### Source evaluation discipline


Every data point undergoes systematic vetting. We cross-reference multiple channels, assess reliability indicators, and discard noise—ensuring only credible intelligence shapes our conclusions.




### Pattern and inconsistency analysis


We map behavioral patterns across timelines and contexts, flagging discrepancies that standard checks miss. Subtle contradictions often reveal deeper risk factors.




### Contextual credibility checks


Data means little without context. We evaluate claims against industry norms, regional realities, and role-specific expectations—delivering nuanced, actionable insight.




### Stakeholder-ready communication


Findings are distilled into clear, executive-level reports. No jargon, no ambiguity—just decision-ready intelligence that supports confident action.
















## Ethics, discretion, and professional boundaries




Our work operates within strict legal and ethical frameworks. We rely on lawful information sources, transparent methodologies, and evidence-weighted conclusions. Every assessment prioritizes decision usefulness over sensational claims, ensuring that our findings support sound judgment without overreach or speculation.



We understand the sensitivity of human risk consulting for businesses and the trust required to engage with this type of advisory service. Our approach minimizes exposure, protects organizational reputation, and respects the privacy boundaries of all parties involved. We never disclose client engagements or findings beyond authorized stakeholders.



Professional boundaries are non-negotiable. We provide strategic intelligence to support informed decisions—not to replace due process, bypass organizational governance, or serve as a substitute for legal counsel. Our role is advisory, our methods are transparent, and our commitment to discretion is absolute.






### Confidential by design


All engagements are conducted under strict confidentiality protocols. Client identities, assessment subjects, and findings are protected through secure communication channels and need-to-know access controls.





### Evidence-weighted conclusions


We distinguish between verified facts, corroborated patterns, and contextual observations. Every finding is documented with source attribution and confidence levels, ensuring decision-makers understand the strength of the evidence.





### Respect for organizational governance


Our intelligence supports—but never replaces—your internal decision-making processes. We provide clarity and context, empowering leadership to act within their established frameworks and legal obligations.













## Ready for a defensible decision process?


Invite contact for a confidential scope discussion aligned to role sensitivity and business exposure.

Contact P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence










Empowering decisions through intelligence and insight.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://prdsbi.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence








































- Services
- Methodology
- Cases








עברית



Contact






# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence



Last Updated:  3/16/2026



P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website https://prdsbi.com ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence

- Email: info@prdsbi.com

- Phone: +972543975210

- Address: Israel



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://prdsbi.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence








































- Services
- Methodology
- Cases








עברית



Contact






# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence



Last updated:  March 16, 2026



P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence

- Email: info@prdsbi.com

- Phone: +972543975210



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# P.R.D.S - Business Intelligence



Last updated:  March 16, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Business Intelligence & Risk Consulting provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence provides Business Intelligence & Risk Consulting through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: P.R.D.S - Buisness Intelligence

- Email: info@prdsbi.com

- Phone: +972543975210

- Address: Israel

Case Studies


# Intelligence in Action:Real Decisions, Real Outcomes



Each engagement tells a story of risk identified before it became loss. These case studies document how P.R.D.S applied advanced OSINT, behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to protect businesses from misplaced trust—before costly decisions were made. All findings are produced using fully lawful methods and are documented to evidentiary standards, admissible in court proceedings where required. Explore the methodology behind the results.

Request a Confidential Consultation


















## How We Work — and What We Protect Against



Every engagement P.R.D.S undertakes begins with a single question: what does this organization stand to lose if the wrong person is trusted with the wrong access? The case studies presented here are drawn from real advisory engagements—anonymized to protect client confidentiality—and reflect the breadth of risk scenarios our team has been retained to assess.


From pre-hire due diligence on senior executives to mid-partnership behavioral assessments and internal fraud investigations, each case illustrates a distinct failure mode that standard screening processes routinely miss. Our methodology combines OSINT, structured behavioral analysis, and strategic interviewing to surface what background checks cannot.







### Scope of Engagements


Our case work spans executive hiring, partnership vetting, internal fraud investigation, and sensitive role assessments across industries including finance, technology, healthcare, and professional services.





### Methodology Applied


Each case deploys a layered intelligence framework: open-source intelligence gathering, behavioral pattern mapping, and structured elicitation interviews—calibrated to the specific risk profile of the individual under assessment.





### Outcomes Documented


Documented outcomes include prevented hires, recovered assets, restructured partnerships, and early-stage fraud detection—each representing a material risk that was identified before it became a liability.












Selected Engagements


## Evidence-Led Diligence in Practice


The following case summaries illustrate the scope and methodology of P.R.D.S engagements. All identifying details have been anonymized to protect client confidentiality.











01

### Internal Theft Investigation: E-Commerce & Consumer Club


A large e-commerce and consumer club company discovered, almost by chance, that a mobile device had gone missing from its central warehouse. What appeared to be an isolated incident quickly revealed a far more systematic scheme — concealed for months by the very person responsible for preventing it.


Situation

Eight employees were identified as potential suspects. Given the logistics team leader's position of trust — with full authority over goods entering and leaving the warehouse — no formal inventory records existed for the missing device. Without deeper investigation, there was no viable path to accountability.



The Inquiry

P.R.D.S conducted OSINT investigations across all eight suspects, cross-referencing publicly available information with activity on social media platforms. Digital indicators narrowed the focus to two employees. Structured strategic interviews were subsequently conducted for all suspects, supported by polygraph examination to corroborate findings.



Outcome

The investigation confirmed that the logistics team leader had been systematically intercepting newly received devices before they were logged into the company's inventory system — suppressing their receipts entirely. The devices were then sold privately, with proceeds retained personally. Because of his role overseeing all inbound and outbound goods, the scheme generated no paper trail and would have remained undetected without structured investigation and polygraph-supported interviewing.















02

### Internal Fraud Investigation: Retail Distribution Group


A regional retail distribution group experienced a pattern of unexplained inventory losses across three warehouse locations over an eight-month period. Internal audits were inconclusive. Leadership suspected collusion but lacked the methodology to identify responsible parties without triggering legal exposure.


Situation

The losses were consistent with organized internal diversion rather than external theft. Several employees in logistics and receiving had access to the affected inventory streams. The client needed a discreet assessment that would not disrupt operations or expose the company to wrongful-accusation liability.



The Inquiry

P.R.D.S deployed behavioral analysis across the identified employee pool, supplemented by OSINT review of financial indicators and lifestyle inconsistencies. Structured advisory interviews were conducted under a neutral operational pretext to avoid tipping off subjects.



Outcome

The assessment identified a coordinated arrangement between two employees and an external logistics contractor. The client was able to terminate the relationships and restructure access controls with documented cause, substantially reducing legal risk. Estimated loss prevention exceeded $340,000 on an annualized basis.















03

### Inventory Loss Investigation: Leading Beverage Company


The owner of a leading beverage company discovered that a significant quantity of alcohol products had simply vanished — without witnesses or clear traces. The financial exposure was severe, but the harder burden was the creeping suspicion toward his own team: people he had built his business with and trusted. That suspicion was quietly poisoning the day-to-day atmosphere long before any formal investigation began.


Situation

With no witnesses and no obvious trail, the owner faced a painful question: could someone inside the organization be responsible? The uncertainty was not merely financial — it was personal. The suspicion cast over his staff was reshaping relationships and eroding the culture he had spent years building. A definitive, evidence-based answer was the only path to resolution.



The Inquiry

The investigation team was deployed without prior assumptions and began a systematic reconstruction of events. The process included an end-to-end review of the entire production workflow, analysis of operational data across multiple production cycles, and a close physical examination of the environment in which the losses had occurred.



Findings

The investigation determined that no human misconduct had taken place. Two small filling heads on the bottling machine had suffered minor damage — imperceptible during active production, yet sufficient to cause consistent leakage during routine work breaks. Due to the layout of the production area, the leaked liquid was absorbed and drained without leaving any visible trace. The fault had accumulated silently over months before the numerical discrepancies became apparent.



Outcome

When the findings were presented, the owner's relief was immediate and profound — not only because the financial picture was now clear, but because he could look at his people again without the corrosive doubt that had taken hold. This case reflects a principle central to P.R.D.S engagements: not every investigation ends with a guilty party. Sometimes the most valuable outcome is simply being able to say with certainty — "It wasn't my people."










Each engagement reflects the same foundational principle: that informed decisions require more than documentation. P.R.D.S provides the structured intelligence layer that transforms surface-level screening into genuine organizational protection—before exposure becomes consequence.












### 97%


Of engagements identify material risk factors that standard background checks entirely miss.







### 500+


High-stakes individual assessments completed across executive hiring, partnerships, and sensitive role placements.







### $40M+


In projected losses prevented for client organizations through early identification of fraud, theft, and misplaced trust.







### 15 Years


Of combined Israeli intelligence and business risk consulting expertise informing every assessment we conduct.










## Ready to Protect What You've Built?


Every partnership, hire, and strategic decision carries risk. P.R.D.S brings Israeli-trained intelligence methodology to the boardroom—so you act on verified insight, not assumption. Let's discuss what a discreet assessment could mean for your organization.

Request a Confidential Consultation
